name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union provides in-person money transfers, cash pickup, bill payments, and money order services at hundreds of agent locations across the US since 1851.
description_long:
Western Union is a globally recognized money transfer company that has operated since 1851, establishing itself as a trusted financial services provider for over 170 years. The company specializes in facilitating in-person financial transactions through a vast network of agent locations, including Walmart stores, grocery chains, and dedicated retail partners across the United States.

Western Union's core service offerings include domestic and international money transfers conducted in person at agent locations, bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations, money order purchasing and cashing, cash pickup from funds sent by others, and prepaid Visa card receipt options. Customers can register online or through the Western Union mobile app and complete transactions in person to streamline the process. The company provides Money Transfer Control Numbers (MTCNs) for tracking transfers and ensures recipients can pick up funds using this number and valid ID.

The company distinguishes itself through its extensive physical location network—operating at hundreds of agent locations including major retailers—and its hybrid online-to-offline model allowing customers to initiate transfers digitally and pay in cash at locations. Western Union emphasizes encryption and fraud prevention measures to protect transactions. For international transfers, the company handles currency exchange automatically at prevailing rates, and currently offers fee-free first international online transfers.

However, Western Union's in-person service model comes with inherent limitations: transactions require visiting a physical location during business hours, fees apply to most transfers, and the company does not provide standalone currency exchange services. Customers cannot use credit cards at all locations, and international payment processing can experience delays (as noted for Orange Wallet in Cameroon on their current website). The service is primarily suited for those needing reliable cash-based money movement rather than low-cost alternatives.
address: 998 Sierra Vista Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89169

company_info.headquarters: 998 Sierra Vista Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89169

pros: Extensive network of 500+ agent locations including Walmart and major retail chains across the US
Established credibility—operating reliably since 1851 with encryption and fraud prevention
Hybrid digital-physical model: register online/app and pay cash in-store to save time
Fast cash pickup service—recipients can access funds in minutes at participating locations
Multiple receipt options: cash, prepaid Visa card (no minimum balance or credit check), or money order
Convenient bill payment at agent locations for utilities, rent, and car payments
Free first international online money transfer promotion available
MTCN tracking system allows both sender and recipient to confirm fund arrival
cons: Requires visiting a physical location during business hours; service hours vary by location
Service fees apply to most transfers; pricing varies by transfer method and destination
Does not accept credit cards at all locations, limiting payment flexibility
International payments may experience delays (company acknowledges delays to Orange Wallet in Cameroon)
No standalone currency exchange service; relies on automatic conversion at time of transfer
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing reliable cash-based money movement
People sending money to family and friends domestically or internationally without bank accounts
Customers who prefer in-person transactions with immediate confirmation and tracking
Bill payers seeking alternative payment methods at convenient retail locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers without traditional bank accounts who need reliable, verifiable in-person money transfer and cash payment services through an established brand. The main caveat is that all services require visiting a physical location and fees apply to transfers; this is not a low-cost alternative but a convenient, secure option for those prioritizing accessibility and tracking over price.
services: Domestic money transfers in person at agent locations
International money transfers with automatic currency exchange
Money order purchase and cashing at participating locations
Cash pickup service for funds sent via MTCN
Bill payment (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating agent locations
Prepaid Visa card receipt option for money transfers
Online/app registration for faster in-store transactions
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) issuance and tracking
Agent location finder service via website
Bank partner services at select financial institutions
Retail location services at grocery chains and major retailers
